creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 171944
update x11-themes/gtk-E17-theme to 3.20.0

E17gtk has moved from Gnome-look.org to GitHub and has changed versioning. The version number now corresponds to the compatible leading version of GTK. This is version 3.20.0, so it is compatible with GTK2 and GTK3.20 only. The previous version should remain in ports for use with GTK3.18 until the gtk3 port is updated to 3.20, at which time this port should also be updated to the 3.20.x version.
